name: network-state-closeout
description: Guide private network-state initialization, autonomously maintain verified records, and reconcile status/process cards through a traceable private handoff ledger.

interface.shortDescription: Maintain private network facts and close out completed actions.
interface.longDescription: Guide first-time private network-state setup, optionally connect a GitHub private repository with a mandatory latest-state gate, autonomously maintain confirmed durable records, and reconcile completed status/process card pairs through validated receipts and a private handoff ledger.
defaultPrompt: Use $initialize-network-state to create or adopt my private profile without scanning the network.
Use $initialize-network-state to guide me through connecting a confirmed GitHub private repository.
Use $network-state to synchronize, answer my request, autonomously record confirmed durable facts, then write and reconcile status and process cards.
Use $action-closeout-cards to create a validated network-state handoff pair for the completed action.
